content: Great place to walk ... My husband and I enjoyed walking and birding in the park. We saw many hummingbirds, chestnut-backed chickadees, and pygmy nuthatch there.

title: McLaren Park : r/AskSF - Reddit
content: It's a cool park with lots to explore. Philosopher's Trail is nice, but there are a lot of trails that wind around the park, and it's fun to just walk through.

title: Live Near John McLaren Park: San Francisco's Hidden Gem
content: # Life Near John McLaren Park: San Francisco’s Best-Kept Secret. # **Discover San Francisco’s Best-Kept Secret: Life Near John McLaren Park**. Let me tell you something about living near McLaren Park – it’s one of San Francisco’s best-kept secrets! If you’re dreaming of that park-adjacent lifestyle without the Golden Gate Park price tag, you’re going to love what I’m about to share. ## **Excelsior: The Heart of John McLaren Park Living**. Picture this: 312 acres of diverse landscapes and activities (that’s huge!), and it’s way less crowded than Golden Gate Park, with this amazing wild, natural feel. Plus, you’ve got amazing community events like Parks & Rec resource days, and you’re right next to San Bruno Mountain State Park. Here’s what makes a living near McLaren Park so incredible – you’re getting this amazing combination of urban park access, affordability, and that authentic San Francisco neighborhood feel that’s getting harder to find these days.
